Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoena, Ot In The Alternative, Motion To Modify Deposition Subpoenas; Request For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $3,040.00 Against Defendants, And Against Their Counsel
Off Calendar Apr-26-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Michael Tafarella (310-272-7157; Michael.Tafarella@kashlegal.com) of the Law Office of Jonathan M. Kashani for Plaintiff.
Marcus N. McElhenney (510-457-3440; marcus.mcelhenney@farmersinsurance.com) of Stratman, Schwartz & Williamns Abrego San Francisco for Defendant

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF SHARON LEE's Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoena, Or In The Alternative, Motion To Modify Deposition Subpoenas; Request For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $3,040.00 Against Defendants, And Against Their Counsel: Denied as moot, no sanctions.

Mr. Tarafella to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling via email to sigrid.irias@gmail.com

Judge Pro Tem: Sigird Irias, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
